# Cover & Protect

> Cover & Protect is the practice of Sertac Tekin, an Ontario-licensed independent
> insurance advisor based in Toronto (FSRA Licence #10112782). We help individuals,
> families, newcomers, visitors, and small businesses find the right coverage across
> Super Visa, visitor, travel, health, group benefits, critical illness, life &
> estate planning, long-term care, and savings plans. Independent advice, multiple
> insurers compared, no cost to get a quote.

## Key facts

- Advisor: Sertac Tekin, independent insurance advisor
- Regulator: FSRA (Financial Services Regulatory Authority of Ontario), Licence #10112782
- Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Serves: all of Ontario
- Phone: +1 647-366-9495 · WhatsApp: +1 647-366-9495
- Email: contact@coverandprotect.ca
- Compliance: FSRA Licensed, PIPEDA Compliant

## Services

- [Super Visa Insurance Ontario](https://coverandprotect.ca/super-visa-insurance-ontario.html): IRCC-compliant $100K+ coverage for parents & grandparents applying for a Super Visa.
- [Visitor Insurance Canada](https://coverandprotect.ca/visitor-insurance-canada.html): Emergency medical coverage for visitors, tourists, relatives, and new immigrants to Canada.
- [Travel Insurance](https://coverandprotect.ca/travel-insurance.html): Emergency medical, trip cancellation, multi-trip, and snowbird plans for Canadians travelling abroad.
- [Health Insurance Ontario](https://coverandprotect.ca/health-insurance.html): Individual & family plans for dental, vision, prescription drugs, and paramedical care.
- [Group Benefits](https://coverandprotect.ca/group-benefits.html): Affordable health, dental, disability & life benefits for Ontario small businesses.
- [Critical Illness Insurance](https://coverandprotect.ca/critical-illness.html): Tax-free lump-sum coverage, with return-of-premium options, for cancer, heart attack, stroke, and more.
- [Life & Estate Planning](https://coverandprotect.ca/estate-planning.html): Term, whole, and corporate-owned life insurance for legacy and estate planning.
- [Long-Term Care Planning](https://coverandprotect.ca/long-term-care.html): Planning for long-term care costs using critical illness, life, disability & savings coverage.
- [Savings Plans (RESP & RRSP)](https://coverandprotect.ca/savings-plans.html): Maximize government grants and tax-sheltered growth with RESP and RRSP strategies.

## Guides

- [How Much Does Super Visa Insurance Cost in Canada? (2026 Guide)](https://coverandprotect.ca/blog-supervisa-cost.html): 2026 pricing ranges for the required $100K Super Visa coverage.
- [Travel Insurance for Canadians Going Abroad (2026 Guide)](https://coverandprotect.ca/blog-travel-insurance-canadians.html): Why provincial plans fall short abroad and what coverage Canadians need.
- [Does OHIP Cover You Outside Canada? (2026 Guide)](https://coverandprotect.ca/blog-ohip-coverage-abroad.html): What OHIP does and doesn't cover outside Ontario and Canada, and why travel insurance matters.
- [Best Visitor Insurance for New Immigrants & Parents (2026)](https://coverandprotect.ca/blog-visitor-insurance-new-immigrants.html): The provincial health waiting period for newcomers and how visitor to Canada insurance fills the gap.
- [Super Visa Insurance for Parents from India (2026 Guide)](https://coverandprotect.ca/blog-super-visa-parents-india.html): The insurance requirement, costs, and pre-existing condition tips for bringing parents from India on a Super Visa.
- [Critical Illness vs. Life Insurance: Which Do You Need? (2026)](https://coverandprotect.ca/blog-critical-illness-vs-life-insurance.html): How the two differ, when you need each, and why many families carry both.

## More

- [Homepage](https://coverandprotect.ca/): Overview of all services and how to get a free quote.
